name: io.github.tersignhq/evidence
description: Counter-signed evidence records for agent commerce: receipts, verification, dispute envelopes.

environmentVariables.name: TERSIGN_SELLER_KEY
environmentVariables.description: 0x-prefixed private key the seller signs receipts with

environmentVariables.name: TERSIGN_LEDGER_URL
environmentVariables.description: Hosted ledger base URL for counter-signing (optional; SDK works standalone)

environmentVariables.name: TERSIGN_LEDGER_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Ledger seller API key (required only if counter-signing)

environmentVariables.name: TERSIGN_LEDGER_SELLER_ID
environmentVariables.description: Ledger seller id (required only if counter-signing)

title: Tersign Evidence

io.modelcontextprotocol.registry/publish.summary: Tersign is the evidence layer for agent commerce (B2B / machine-to-machine). Agents issue seller-signed EIP-712 receipts and action records; the hosted ledger at https://tersign.ai optionally counter-signs them into per-seller hash chains that anyone can verify without an account. Disputes export as venue-ready evidence envelopes (generic / internet-court / kleros / uma). The SDK and MCP server work fully standalone without the hosted ledger: issue and verify offline, counter-sign later. Record shapes are pinned by public conformance vectors: https://github.com/tersignhq/evidence-record-conformance (Apache-2.0, CI-tested). Verify a live counter-signed record right now: npx tersign verify 0xe5874f1ffe87f0a6dd9eb157730f67b86ee4538b125fe30fcc4e165213dd3fc4 --ledger https://tersign.ai
